titles.title: Tsuihou sareta Tensei Juukishi wa Game Chishiki de Musou suru
The Exiled Reincarnated Heavy Knight is Unrivaled in Game Knowledge
追放された転生重騎士はゲーム知識で無双する
The Exiled Heavy Knight Knows How to Game the System

data.title: Tsuihou sareta Tensei Juukishi wa Game Chishiki de Musou suru
data.title_english: The Exiled Heavy Knight Knows How to Game the System
data.title_japanese: 追放された転生重騎士はゲーム知識で無双する
title_synonyms: The Exiled Reincarnated Heavy Knight is Unrivaled in Game Knowledge
data.synopsis:
"You useless son of mine! You were supposed to pull master swordsman, but I never thought it would be this tragic!"

The day a child turns fifteen, they undergo the Ritual of Divine Blessing. Already descended from a line of master swordsman, Elymas was supposed to succeed his father. However, he pulls the defective class, the Heavy Knight, and not only loses his status as future head of the household, but he's also exiled. With their unbalanced stats and seemingly useless skills, Heavy Knights are spoked of as a class for cowards and the lazy. However, Elymas knows the truth. The world he lives in is the same as the one of the game he used to play... It is the Heavy Knight that is the most powerful class of them all. Using memories from his past life, Elymas has set out to effectively conquer this entire world.

(Source: Kodansha USA)
data.background: Tsuihou sareta Tensei Juukishi wa Game Chishiki de Musou suru aired on MBS and TBS' Super Animeism Turbo block.

data.title: Maebashi Witches
data.synopsis:
In the city of Maebashi, Yuina Akagi is a free-spirited high school girl with a hobby of buying trendy clothes online and taking photos of her life's highlights. One day, a talking frog suddenly speaks to her, sees in her the potential to become a witch, and transports her to the Witch-Verse. There, the frog introduces Yuina to four other girls he has recruited—the cheerful Choco Mitsumata; the composed Kyouka Kitahara; the easygoing Mai Kamiizumi; and the short-fused Azu Niisato who is apprehensive of Yuina's arrival.

Despite the initial clash of personalities, the five girls aim to become true witches. To achieve that goal, they must grant people's wishes in the real world through music—the most efficient conduit for channeling magic. As Yuina learns to control her newfound powers, her journey into a magical life helping others will be far more vibrant than any photo her camera can ever hope to capture.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Chotto dake Ai ga Omoi Dark Elf ga Isekai kara Oikaketekita
A Dark Elf with a Slightly Overwhelming Love Chased Me All the Way from Another World
ちょっとだけ愛が重いダークエルフが異世界から追いかけてきた
Yandere Dark Elf: She Chased Me All the Way From Another World!

data.title: Chotto dake Ai ga Omoi Dark Elf ga Isekai kara Oikaketekita
data.title_english: Yandere Dark Elf: She Chased Me All the Way From Another World!
data.title_japanese: ちょっとだけ愛が重いダークエルフが異世界から追いかけてきた
title_synonyms: A Dark Elf with a Slightly Overwhelming Love Chased Me All the Way from Another World
data.synopsis:
When high school student Hinata Sunohara was summoned to another world to defeat the Demon Lord, he promised to marry Mariabelle, a beautiful dark elf. But once his mission ended, Hinata was returned to Earth, leaving Mariabelle devastated.

After a month back in Japan, Hinata's life has seemingly gone back to normal. However, everything changes again when Mariabelle suddenly appears in his room! Swearing to remain by his side forever, she begins living with him. As her obsessive love grows by the day, Mariabelle wishes to protect Hinata from any threat and ensure that he only has eyes for her.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Taisu Xilie
data.synopsis:
An animation anthology film project telling four interlinked tales of animated sci-fi and fantasy by directors from Japan, China and the USA that talks about war, life, love and what we are as human.

(Source: IMDB)

data.title: Pihotek
data.synopsis:
Informed by his relationships with Inuit friends and 20 years of mostly solo expeditions, Yasunaga Ogita pens a poetic account of a walk in the Arctic. He observes animals in their natural habitat, and falls asleep with a sense of oneness with nature mediated by the wind. Then when the new dawn arrives with energy for the world, he sets off walking again. An essay in the back of the book discusses the seriousness of climate change.

(Source: Kodansha)

data.title: Tian Ying
data.synopsis:
Lu Chen, the "Shadow" undercover agent of Fuyun Division, was cursed by black fire for destroying the demon sect's divine spell, and his cultivation was completely destroyed. After ten years of living in exile and seclusion, Master Tian Lan appeared again and gave Lu Chen the task of going to the Kunlun Sect to find the undercover demon sect. In order to repair the damaged Five Elements God Disk, Lu Chen was ordered to become a hundred of the Kunlun Sect. A handyman disciple in the thatched cottage. In the process of carrying out the mission, he met many friends and the love of his life Yi Xin, and gradually felt the warmth of the world. At the same time, he touched on the secrets behind Kunlun from various clues, and discovered that the black dragon sealed in the Kunlun Forbidden Land was not an evil monster, but had always claimed to be for The righteous Tian Lan actually had other plans. After realizing the facts, Lu Chen was confused for a while. With Yi Xin's encouragement, he decided to face the past and no longer stick to the so-called distinction between good and evil, but to follow his heart and do the right thing.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Shishigari
data.synopsis:
Deep in the northern mountains, there are people who have been living with the blessings of the mountains. A boy, who is coming of age, journeys into the mountains for his first hunt. The mountain is a world where life and death are divided by a paper-thin line. Sometimes, nature will show its fangs...

(Source: Official Website)
